user.title: Bob
user.description: Configureer Bob. Je kunt tijdens setup optioneel WiFi en MQTT via BLE provisionen.

abort.already_configured: Deze Bob commando-prefix is al geconfigureerd.

error.ssid_required: SSID is verplicht wanneer BLE provisioning is ingeschakeld.
error.ble_provision_failed: BLE provisioning mislukt. Controleer of Bob in setup-modus staat en dichtbij is.
